articles.title: Blake Lively Made No Money in Justin Baldoni Settlement, But Legal Fight Is Not Quite Over - Variety
articles.description: No money changed hands between Justin Baldoni and Blake Lively in their settlement, but Lively still has a pending motion for damages.

articles.title: Alex Consani Celebrates Being First Trans Woman on Met Gala Host Committee by Revealing Breasts on Red Carpet in Sheer Gucci Gown - The Hollywood Reporter
